name: Wood
description: A versatile building material.

name: Core wood
description: Wood from pine trees, used for sturdy structures.

name: Fine wood
description: Smooth, high-quality wood from birch and oak.

name: Stone
description: A solid chunk of rock for building and crafting.

name: Flint
description: A sharp stone found near water, used for early tools.

name: Coal
description: Burns hot and long. Fuel for smelters and forges.

name: Resin
description: Sticky tree sap used as torch fuel.

name: Feathers
description: Light feathers used for arrows and bedding.

name: Leather scraps
description: Bits of leather from boars and other beasts.

name: Deer hide
description: The hide of a deer, used for early armor.

name: Boar trophy
description: The mounted head of a slain boar.

name: Coins
description: Old gold coins. Currency of the merchant.

name: Copper ore
description: Raw copper ore. Smelt it into copper bars.

name: Copper
description: A bar of smelted copper.

name: Tin ore
description: Raw tin ore found near water in the Black Forest.

name: Tin
description: A bar of smelted tin. Combine with copper for bronze.

name: Bronze
description: An alloy of copper and tin. Strong and reliable.

name: Iron
description: A bar of smelted iron from scrap dug up in crypts.

name: Scrap iron
description: Rusty scrap iron found in sunken crypts.

name: Silver
description: A bar of smelted silver from the Mountains.

name: Silver ore
description: Raw silver ore buried beneath the Mountains.

name: Black metal
description: A bar of black metal forged from fuling scrap.

name: Chitin
description: Hard shell harvested from abominations of the deep.

name: Guck
description: Glowing sap from the great trees of the Swamp.

name: Raspberries
description: Sweet wild raspberries. A quick snack.

name: Blueberries
description: Tart blueberries from the Black Forest.

name: Mushroom
description: An edible mushroom that restores a little health.

name: Honey
description: Sweet honey harvested from a beehive.

name: Queen bee
description: A queen bee, needed to start a beehive.

name: Thunderstone
description: A stone crackling with stored lightning.

name: Surtling core
description: A glowing core that powers smelters and kilns.

name: Elder bark
description: Bark from the great trees of the Swamp.

name: Tar
description: Thick black tar harvested from tar pits.

name: Crystal
description: A clear crystal dropped by stone golems.

name: Obsidian
description: Sharp volcanic glass mined in the Mountains.

name: Flametal ore
description: Molten-hot ore found in the Ashlands and Mistlands.

name: Bronze sword
description: A well-balanced bronze sword.

name: Iron sword
description: A heavy iron sword that cuts deep.

name: Silver sword
description: A silver sword, deadly to the undead.

name: Bronze axe
description: A bronze axe for chopping wood and foes.

name: Iron axe
description: A sturdy iron axe.

name: Iron mace
description: A blunt iron mace that crushes bone.

name: Iron atgeir
description: A long polearm with a sweeping secondary attack.

name: Bronze spear
description: A throwable bronze spear.

name: Iron battleaxe
description: A two-handed iron battleaxe.

name: Crude bow
description: A simple wooden bow.

name: Huntsman bow
description: A refined bow for the seasoned hunter.

name: Draugr fang
description: A powerful bow infused with poison.

name: Wood shield
description: A basic wooden shield.

name: Bronze buckler
description: A small bronze buckler good for parrying.

name: Iron tower shield
description: A heavy iron tower shield.

name: Bronze plate cuirass
description: A bronze chest plate offering solid protection.

name: Bronze plate leggings
description: Bronze leg armor.

name: Bronze helmet
description: A bronze helmet.

name: Iron scale mail
description: Iron scale chest armor.

name: Iron greaves
description: Iron leg armor.

name: Iron helmet
description: An iron helmet with a wide brim.

name: Wolf armor chest
description: Warm wolf-fur chest armor for the Mountains.

name: Wolf fur cape
description: A warm wolf-fur cape that resists frost.

name: Iron pickaxe
description: An iron pickaxe for mining ore and stone.

name: Hammer
description: Used to build and repair structures.

name: Hoe
description: Used to level and raise the ground.

name: Cultivator
description: Used to till soil and plant crops.

name: Wood arrow
description: A basic wooden arrow.

name: Flint arrow
description: A flint-tipped arrow that hits harder.

name: Fire arrow
description: An arrow wrapped in burning resin.

name: Obsidian arrow
description: A razor-sharp obsidian arrow.

name: Torch
description: Lights the dark and wards off the cold.

name: Minor healing mead
description: A mead that quickly restores health.

name: Minor stamina mead
description: A mead that restores stamina.

name: Frost resistance mead
description: Wards off the cold for a time.

name: Cooked meat
description: Cooked boar or deer meat. Hearty and filling.

name: Cooked serpent meat
description: Cooked sea-serpent meat. A feast.

name: Carrot
description: A crunchy carrot. Plant the seeds to grow more.

name: Turnip
description: An earthy turnip grown in the Swamp.

name: Deer
description: A timid deer. Drops meat and hide.

name: Boar
description: A wild boar. Can be tamed and bred.

name: Neck
description: A small lizard found near water.

name: Greyling
description: A weak forest creature made of bark and moss.

name: Greydwarf
description: A hostile creature of the Black Forest.

name: Greydwarf brute
description: A large, powerful greydwarf.

name: Greydwarf shaman
description: A greydwarf that heals its allies.

name: Skeleton
description: An undead skeleton warrior.

name: Troll
description: A towering troll. Hits like a battering ram.

name: Draugr
description: An undead warrior of the Swamp.

name: Draugr elite
description: An elite undead warrior wielding an axe.

name: Blob
description: An oozing blob that splashes poison.

name: Surtling
description: A burning creature found in the Swamp.

name: Wraith
description: A flying undead spirit that prowls at night.

name: Wolf
description: A fierce mountain wolf. Can be tamed.

name: Drake
description: A flying drake of the frozen Mountains.

name: Stone golem
description: A massive golem of living rock.

name: Fenring
description: A savage wolf-beast that hunts at night.

name: Lox
description: A huge plains beast. Can be tamed and bred.

name: Fuling
description: A goblin warrior of the Plains.

name: Fuling berserker
description: A massive fuling that swings a tree-trunk club.

name: Fuling shaman
description: A fuling that shields and heals its kin.

name: Growth
description: A tar-spitting growth from the tar pits.

name: Sea serpent
description: A serpent that prowls stormy oceans.

name: Seeker
description: An insectoid horror of the Mistlands.
